title: End Crystal Chain Reaction
description: A mod that makes End Crystals explode when affected by other explosions.  Without this mod, they simply vanish.
body:
![End Crystal Chain Reaction](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ace25e2de6836755c47d1ad4c6931f95777897c0_0.webp)

## Description
In Java Edition, when End Crystals are damaged by explosions, they are deleted from the world without actually exploding.  *End Crystal Chain Reaction* changes this behavior to be more like Bedrock Edition, where End Crystals explode when damaged by explosions.

This allows you to chain End Crystal explosions.

### Features:
- End Crystals damaged by explosions will explode

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
